generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist's swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides wind speed measurements for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from hoist"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Motion simulation model for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance SystemArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System architecture visualization using C4 model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating geometric models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModelCreationService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for core logic of gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control system for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Records operational data for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring through visualizations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system performance through control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures model accuracy through continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies system anomalies for maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages version control for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:provides VersionControlInsight
]

instance SystemArchitectureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemArchitectureInsight
]

instance CADModelCreationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation of geometric CAD models for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides CADModelCreationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis and reporting"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operations"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control adjustments for optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results ensuring model accuracy"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected system anomalies for maintenance"
]

instance VersionControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control status and history for digital twin development"
]

instance SystemArchitectureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized system architecture using C4 model"
]

instance CADModelCreationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Geometric model for crane representation"
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical mechanical components and controller of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital representation of the gantry crane system"
]

instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing physical and digital components of the gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, DigitalTwin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application and sent through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. The system uses an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication, but specific details on command types, message formats, validation mechanisms, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture visualized using C4 Model with context and container diagrams; employs containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics between them, and evaluates the results against an acceptable threshold to ensure model accuracy and system reliability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses an MQTT Broker for inter-service communication, TimescaleDB as the database, and Grafana for dashboard visualization. Specific details on network topology, bandwidth and latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer using Docker Compose for container orchestration, as indicated by the provided docker compose file and Figure 5 depicting component deployment on a local machine."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Uses MQTT protocol for real-time data exchange, TimescaleDB for time-series database storage, and Grafana for visualization dashboards, all containerized via Docker."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes AutomationML for digital twin modeling, a standard for industrial automation. The lab scale gantry crane system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization, adhering to software architecture standards."
]
